name: Halepaska's 7-minute Icing
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the corn syrup and water to a full boil.
2. In a large bowl, beat medium stiff egg whites until they hold soft peaks.
3. Add a few drops of vanilla and a small pinch of salt to the egg whites, then continue beating until well combined.
4. Gradually pour the boiling syrup into the beaten egg whites while continuing to beat at high speed.
5. Beat for an additional 4 minutes until the mixture is thick and glossy.
6. Use the icing immediately while it is still warm on the cake.
